title: Finder Full-Loop Grounding Demo
query: dark brown armchair to the left of the matching chair

stages.name: Plan
stages.line: Parse the request into a primary target, support context, and scoped frame budget.
stages.caption: Finder first turns the language request into target phrases and routes a compact evidence set for the loop.
logs: planner.reason: Loop 0: LLM planner selected 'dark_brown_armchair' as the primary target with 1 supporting target(s).
evidence.goals: Find dark brown armchair candidates; Identify matching chair to verify spatial relation; Confirm left-of relationship between objects

stages.name: Detect
stages.line: Run SAM3 only as the open-vocabulary mask proposal backend, then build 3D candidates.
stages.caption: The detector surfaces multiple plausible object masks; downstream Finder stages keep the ambiguity instead of taking the top SAM3 mask directly.
logs: detect.backend: remote SAM3 masks, Finder 3D clustering and dedup

stages.name: Evidence
stages.line: Attach candidate-local geometry and support-object evidence before planning selection.
stages.caption: Candidate evidence makes support relations explicit, so the later selector compares candidates in context rather than by mask confidence alone.
logs: evidence.reason: geometry and support cues are available to selection planner

stages.name: Selection Plan
stages.line: Shortlist candidates and choose comparison axes for verification.
stages.caption: The selection planner narrows the candidate pool and specifies what relation or attribute evidence must be checked.
logs: selection.reason: Two dark brown armchair candidates found, each with local matching_chair support detected. Both show 'very_near' relation (surface_gap=0.0), but candidate 000 has better center_...
actions: verify spatial relation 'left_of' for both candidates against their local matching_chair detections; compare which candidate's matching_chair has stronger relation evidence

stages.name: Select
stages.line: Compare shortlisted candidates with VLM verification and select the strongest candidate.
stages.caption: The selector compares the shortlisted candidates and records rationales for why the accepted candidate beats alternatives.
logs: select.reason: The selected candidate is dark_brown_armchair_l0_001: visually it is the left chair in the matching pair requested by the query. dark_brown_armchair_l0_000 is kept as the paired distracto...
verifier.summary: The selected candidate is dark_brown_armchair_l0_001: visually it is the left chair in the matching pair requested by the query. dark_brown_armchair_l0_000 is kept as the paired...

stages.name: Judge
stages.caption: The loop judge accepts the selected candidate once the evidence is sufficient; otherwise the same protocol can continue with feedback.
logs: judge.reason: Candidate dark_brown_armchair_l0_001 is selected after visual inspection: it corresponds to the left chair in the paired-armchair view and better matches the query intent. The other armchair remains a close matching d...
